summary: Commercial Auto policy for business vehicles. Complex multi-vehicle, multi-driver, multi-jurisdiction. Highest validation rule count in the book.

schemaEntities.description: Commercial vehicle. Custom: IFTA_Registration, DOT_Number, GVW_Class, HazMatEndorsement, TankEndorsement, PassengerCapacity, AnnualMileage, RadiusOfOperation, VehicleUsageCode.
Commercial driver. Custom: CDL_Class, CDL_Endorsements, MVR_Score, HireDate, ExperienceYears, LastMVRDate.
Multi-vehicle fleet entity. 11 custom fields for fleet rating, blanket vs scheduled coverage, auto-add provisions.
183 rules including: FMCSA compliance checks, DOT number validation, CDL endorsement matching, radius of operation rating class, fleet blanket eligibility.

relationships.note: Fleet schedule entity is non-standard -- no direct GW Cloud equivalent
CSL limits driven by vehicle GVW class -- 9 custom fields involved
183 rules include FMCSA/DOT compliance checks -- regulatory requirement

migrationIssues.detail: FleetSchedule_CALine has no GW Cloud equivalent. Multi-vehicle fleet rating with blanket/scheduled split and auto-add provisions requires new GW Cloud entity design.
183 rules include FMCSA/DOT regulatory checks. These are not in GW Cloud standard config. Need external compliance API or custom Cloud validation rules.
Commercial driver CDL validation and MVR scoring integration. Custom Gosu integration to external MVR provider needs rebuild for GW Cloud API layer.
GVW-based commercial rating class uses 28 custom rate tables. Non-standard structure requires rating table rebuild or external rating engine.

cloudMapping.action: Design new Fleet entity in GW Cloud. Significant architecture work -- 3-4 sprint effort.
GW Cloud supports CDL class -- TypeKey mapping required
FMCSA rules require external API integration in GW Cloud -- new integration design
